// BAD: crate root exposing too many public re-exports
// lib.rs
pub use crate::handlers::handle_request;
pub use crate::handlers::handle_response;
pub use crate::handlers::handle_error;
pub use crate::handlers::handle_timeout;
pub use crate::handlers::handle_redirect;
pub use crate::handlers::handle_websocket;
pub use crate::models::User;
pub use crate::models::Order;
pub use crate::models::Product;
pub use crate::models::Category;
pub use crate::models::Review;
pub use crate::models::Cart;
pub use crate::config::Config;
pub use crate::config::DatabaseConfig;
pub use crate::config::CacheConfig;
pub use crate::config::AuthConfig;
pub use crate::config::LoggingConfig;
pub use crate::utils::format_date;
pub use crate::utils::parse_json;
pub use crate::utils::validate_email;
pub use crate::utils::hash_password;
pub use crate::errors::AppError;
pub use crate::errors::DatabaseError;
pub use crate::errors::AuthError;
pub use crate::errors::ValidationError;
